title: Hibernate and JPA
source: Hibernate ORM User Guide + Jakarta Persistence spec + Spring Data JPA reference; Vlad Mihalcea + Thorben Janssen + Baeldung

items.label: ORM concept, JPA spec vs Hibernate vs Spring Data JPA, why ORM
EntityManagerFactory/EntityManager, persistence unit, SessionFactory/Session, bootstrapping
@Entity/@Table, @Column, field vs property access, @Basic, @Transient
Naming strategies, schema generation (ddl-auto), @Temporal and modern date/time
@Id, @GeneratedValue strategies (IDENTITY/SEQUENCE/TABLE/AUTO/UUID), sequence tuning
Composite keys (@IdClass vs @EmbeddedId), natural keys, equals/hashCode for entities
@OneToOne/@OneToMany/@ManyToOne/@ManyToMany mappings
Owning vs inverse side, mappedBy, @JoinColumn/@JoinTable, bidirectional sync
@Embeddable/@Embedded, @ElementCollection, @Enumerated
AttributeConverter (@Convert), @Lob, custom types
SINGLE_TABLE, JOINED, TABLE_PER_CLASS, discriminator column, trade-offs
@MappedSuperclass, polymorphic queries
Entity states (transient/managed/detached/removed), persist/merge/remove/detach, first-level cache, dirty checking, flush modes
Cascade types, orphanRemoval, entity lifecycle callbacks (@PrePersist et al)
EAGER vs LAZY, lazy proxies, LazyInitializationException
N+1 select problem, fetch joins, @EntityGraph, batch fetching
JPQL/HQL, named queries, parameters, projections, pagination
Criteria API (type-safe, metamodel), native SQL queries, @SqlResultSetMapping
Repository hierarchy, derived query methods, @Query (JPQL + native)
Pagination and sorting (Pageable/Slice), projections (interface/DTO)
Specifications (JPA Criteria), custom repository fragments, @Modifying queries
Auditing (@CreatedDate/@LastModifiedDate), @EntityGraph in repos, Querydsl awareness
@Transactional with JPA, transaction boundaries, flush-on-commit
Optimistic locking (@Version), pessimistic locking (LockModeType), lost-update problem
First-level (persistence context) vs second-level cache, cache concurrency strategies, providers
Query cache, @Cacheable/@Cache, cache pitfalls
JDBC statement batching, batch inserts/updates, DTO projections over entities
Open-session-in-view anti-pattern, common pitfalls, connection/statement tuning, monitoring SQL
